_comment: OPTIONAL. Copy to ~/.claude/quartermaster/tools.json to override the auto-classifier. Covers ANY tool -- an MCP tool (mcp__server__tool), an MCP server (applies to all its tools), or a built-in tool (e.g. WebSearch). A target value under "servers"/"tools"/"builtins" may be: a tier keyword (a key in "tiers", e.g. "read" or "write"); a direct agent name ("orchestrator", "scout", "mechanic", or "builder"); or "skip" to drop the tool entirely. Edit/Write/MultiEdit/NotebookEdit/Bash can NEVER be granted to the orchestrator, no matter what this file says -- enforced unconditionally in code. Everything works with NO policy file; this is only for tuning.
